transcript:
CALLER: Uh, hi. I booked an appointment last week online and I want to, uh, change the timing. Not the date, just the time.
AGENT: Sure, that's easy to do. Name and number please?
CALLER: Shweta Bhatt. 9823115566.
AGENT: I see your appointment with Dr. Kiran Bhosale in neurology this Wednesday at 9 AM. What time would you prefer?
CALLER: Can I get something after 11? I have a school drop to manage in the morning.
AGENT: 11:30 AM on Wednesday works for Dr. Bhosale. Shall I update that?
CALLER: Yes please.
AGENT: Updated! Wednesday appointment now at 11:30 AM. See you then, Ms. Bhatt.
CALLER: Perfect, thanks so much.
